title: Herglese

'''Herglese''' or '''Herglic''' was the [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglics]] from the planet [[Giju/Legends|Giju]]. Most Herglics also learned to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. The language had a written form, which was also known as Herglese.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Due to the influence of Herglic trading within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] several Herglic words were incorporated into the local vocabulary.

{{Language-stub}}

==Glossary of terms==
*''chakk'' - a naïve person. Literally a young Herglic that was not weaned from its mother
*''hauum'' - sound of a Herglic clearing his blowhole. Used at the beginning of a significant remark.
*''pakk'' - city (literally pod community) or planet
*''pison'' - thief/bully or [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official {{C|''[[Rebellion era]]''}}
*''pison-pakk'' - [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] or any Imperial sector capital {{C|''[[Rebellion era]]''}}
*''shen'' - pod mother or a spacecraft that has nurtured the traveler in space
*''shan'' - pod aunt or a spacecraft not traveled in.
*''shan-pakk'' - [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]
*''shep'' - friend (literally podmate) or wingman/sister ship
*''shep-pakk'' - homeworld
*''umron'' - an idiot who is ignorant to his stupidity
